title: Arachnothryx megalantha

The Rubiaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. intro: Arachnothryx megalantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a shrub or small tree native to Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, with reported health benefits including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
